text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After a day out, I stop by a shop with<n>Agnes
Digital to pick up something<n>she preordered.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I've been waiting forever for thisphoto book... Oohoohoo, I'mduty-bound to open it as soon as I gethome!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
That's because I bought three copies.<n>One for
careful perusal, one for<n>posterity, and one for daily
use!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Also, each copy comes with a special<n>raffle entry
for an upcoming release<n>event. Since I bought
three copies,<n>I've tripled my chances of being
select—

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text: Oh, is that Digital? No way! What a<n>coincidence!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Uh... Oh! Hello! I haven't seen you<n>since that
handout event!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We're stopped by a woman inside of<n>the shop. It
seems likely she's a<n>fellow Umamusume fan.

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text:
I know this is a bit sudden, but you<n>don't happen
to be free after this, are<n>you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Well, ummm...

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text:
I'm planning to go to a concert right<n>after this, but
the friend I was<n>supposed to go with can't make
it.

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to leave an empty seat,<n>so I thought I
should find someone<n>else to go.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Right after this? T-that would mean...<n>wait, you're
talking about the secret<n>concert tied to that one
album!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The "Phantom Secret" concert, right?!<n>I bought
sooo many copies of the<n>album, but none of them
contained<n>any tickets!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I convinced myself there was no way<n>to go to a
super-duper premium<n>deluxe concert like that and
gave up...<n>and yet, here you are, an actual
godsend, inviting me to go!

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I've actually got two tickets, so<n>you can
bring your friend, too!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: T-Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I would absolutely love to go!<n>Gyaaaagh! Thank
you so so muuuch!

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha, yay! I just know that you'll<n>liven things
up!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You bet! I'll put everything I've got<n>into it! I even
have my light sticks on<n>me already!

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text:
Does your friend have anything to<n>bring? We're
allowed to take in our<n>own support merch for the
event.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I tell them I don't have any light<n>sticks or anything,
so they both<n>graciously offer to lend me
something.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Do you want a light stick or a paper<n>fan?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'll let you borrow mine! Now,<n>let's head to
the amusement park's<n>special venue space!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh. My. Gooooosh! She winked at<n>me! I must have
died and gone to<n>heaven by this merciless assault
of<n>fanservice!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: ...Wait, what's this?! No way! Is this a<n>new song?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
All the light sticks in the crowd<n>change colors in
time with the music. I<n>do my best to change the
color of<n>mine too, but I panic and fail to make<n>it in
time.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, Trainer! There's a<n>setting to change
the color<n>automatically. Push the button on the
right!
choice_data_list: But I've got the wrong color...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
There's no wrong way to enjoy a<n>concert! Just
respect the rules and<n>have good manners.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Let the music carry you and pick<n>whatever color
you like!
choice_data_list: Okay, I'll try just feeling it.
Okay, I'll try just feeling it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: That's the spirit! Remember to have<n>fun!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh maaaaan... That was... the best.<n>Seriously, like
the best of the very<n>best...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Did you notice her grip during the first<n>song?! I've
never wanted to be a mic<n>stand so badly!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And I liked how intense the dance for<n>the new
song is! Their steps were so<n>powerful, super
fitting for<n>Umamusume. The choreographer<n>really
knows what they're doing!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's heel clicks were all timed<n>so
perfectly! You could really feel how<n>in sync they
were!
choice_data_list: I liked when we waved the lights together.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Definitely! Isn't waving the light stick<n>fun?
choice_data_list: It felt like the whole venue came together as one.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Yes! That's exactly it! When the<n>chorus and the
lights all synced up,<n>it's like we were all unified!
That's<n>the true beauty of concerts!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ah, it's so great that I can talk about<n>this with you!
The other times, I'm<n>always alone, so I can only
fire off<n>my feelings into the Umatterverse.
choice_data_list:
Moments like this after the concert are fun too,
yeah?

Moments like this after the concert are fun too,
yeah?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You totally get it! All right, then... I've<n>got an idea!
I'm gonna apply for two<n>tickets to the release
event tied to the<n>photo books I bought today.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
If I win tickets, let's go together! And<n>then we can
talk all about it after!<n>Okay?!

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text:
You can use the fan my friend was<n>going to use!
Okay, shall we head to<n>the venue over at the
amusement<n>park?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: More! Love! Straight to! My heart!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The call and response echoes<n>throughout the
entire event space.<n>The thrill of the crowd reaches
a fever<n>pitch, and Agnes Digital goes wild<n>along
with everyone else.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Then, the Umamusume on stage<n>walks in our
direction as she sings.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Trainer, your fan! Your fan! Show her<n>the fan!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I do as I'm told and fix the way I'm<n>holding the
fan so the words are<n>facing the stage.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ohmigaaaaagfhksgh!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I saw them! She really spun andshowed them to us! Pant, pant.That. Was. Too. CUTE! The way shelifted her leg?! The way her skirtfluttered?! Absolutely... DIVINE!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hyaaaaagh! A real angel came down<n>from
heaven!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Thanks for allowing me that sip,<n>Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's 'cause of the fan! The fan!<n>Thanks to that,
she gave you a big<n>glass of fanservice, and I got a
sip<n>too!
choice_data_list: Oh yeah. That was pretty nice.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The Umamusume on the stage saw<n>our message
and reacted to it. Even if<n>it was only for a split
second, it felt<n>like we were communicating.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Right? And it's not just the<n>fanservice. Once you
get a taste of<n>the concert atmosphere, it makes
you<n>wanna do it again and again.
choice_data_list: Yeah, I think I know what you mean.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Heheh, live concerts have got you<n>hooked now,
yeah? Congrats,<n>welcome to the ocean of Uma
simping! ☆

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I've got an idea! I'm gonna apply for<n>two tickets
to the release event tied to<n>the photo books I
bought today.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Let's go to another concert together!<n>We'll dive
deeper and deeper till<n>we're drowning in Uma
glory!
